title: depvasian culture
description: a mod that adds a new biome, villager job, wood, and a lot of other depvas themed stuff.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-zaIqJUROeQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>welcome to depvasian culture, this mod adds a new biome, villager job, new tools, blocks, a dimension, blue raspberries, and more! this mod aims to bring aspects from depvas into minecraft.

here are our plans for the future:
make a village type specific to the biome
different types of mobs
more polishing and bugfixes
new biomes specific to the depvas dimension
and much more stuff!

if you're interested in blue raspberries in minecraft, tools that go atleast a little bit above netherite, and just world building in general, this is one of the mods for you!

depvas is a world building project me and one of my friends have been working on, the original date comes from somewhere around late 2020, or 2021, i have been doing most of the lore, and some of the design stuff, lately i just felt like making a mod for minecraft about it, so this past month i've been learning Mcreator, and i think its pretty fun so far. 

this was my first mod and i'm pretty excited for people to see it
